title: Test Python installation on all platforms
description: Test pip install on macOS, Linux, Windows (if in scope). Document prerequisites, minimum Python version.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Current environment is macOS only; cross-platform installation verification requires Windows and Linux runs. Suggest CI matrix or dedicated runners for: pip install taskulus, tsk init/list/update flows, and uninstall verification. Marking as blocked pending platform access.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added tools/verify_python_installation.py to automate pip install/tsk init/doctor in a fresh venv. Local run failed because system Python is 3.9 and project requires 3.11+. Script supports --python for CI/runners with 3.11.

custom.beads_notes:
Plan: run local Python install in a temp venv, verify tsk --version and tsk doctor in a temp git repo; record results and note remaining platforms.
Local macOS test: pip install -e python in temp venv succeeded; tsk --version outputs 'tsk, version 0.1.0'; tsk init + tsk doctor succeed in temp git repo. Added console script entry (project.scripts) and fixed doctor output string. Other platforms still pending.
Adding CI matrix job to run tools/verify_python_installation.py on macOS, Linux, Windows to validate pip install and CLI basics.
Added CI matrix job to run tools/verify_python_installation.py on Ubuntu, macOS, and Windows; run 21941431916 succeeded.
